name: jarir-ahmed/php-llm
description: Framework-agnostic unified AI/LLM toolkit for PHP — LLMs, embeddings, vector databases, RAG, agents, memory, cost tracking and structured output. Merges and extends manik/neuro + manik/cortex with zero framework coupling.

authors.name: Manik Mia
authors.role: Original author of manik/neuro and manik/cortex

suggest.ext-pdo: Required for the persistent memory driver and the pgvector vector driver.
suggest.vlucas/phpdotenv: Load a .env file so the packaged config picks up provider API keys automatically.
